description: JS compilation pipeline refactoring across Babel parser, webpack bundler, and Next.js framework

merge_order.description: Add DecoratorMetadata AST node to @babel/parser, update @babel/types and @babel/traverse for new node type
Update babel-loader parser options passthrough, update tree-shaking to handle decorator side effects with new AST node
Update Next.js Babel/SWC configuration to support new decorator syntax, update next/font and next/image AST parsing

breaking_changes: babel: New AST node type may break plugins that exhaustively match on node types
webpack: babel-loader configuration changes may require updates to webpack.config.js in consumer projects
next.js: next.config.js babel configuration changes, SWC fallback behavior may change
